Job description

Company Overview

World Salon is a rapidly growing startup operating at the intersection of technology, professional development, and media. Originally founded as a student organization at Columbia University, we now connect professionals across the finance, technology, and ESG sectors, fostering collaboration through curated seminars, digital events, and AI-driven content. Our mission is to ignite bold conversations, empower thought leaders, and inspire innovation through dynamic and inclusive platforms.

We are seeking a Full Stack Developer Intern who is excited to work across the frontend and backend, contributing to real product features while gaining hands-on startup experience.

What We Offer

Impactful Work – Build and optimize a platform that connects professionals worldwide.
Innovative Tech Stack – Work with modern technologies like Node.js, Python, and cloud-based tools
Mentorship & Learning – Gain experience working with experienced developers and designers.
Remote Flexibility – Work from anywhere while collaborating with a global team.
Stack Flexibility – Opportunity to explore both frontend and backend 

Role Overview

As a Full Stack Developer Intern, you will contribute to both the frontend and backend of our platform, with a stronger emphasis on frontend development. You will work closely with designers, product managers, and engineers to build our innovative event management platform.

Key Responsibilities:

🔹Frontend Development

Build and maintain responsive and interactive frontend applications using React.js and Next.js.
Collaborate with designers to translate wireframes and mockups into polished UI components
Optimize frontend components for performance, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility
Work with TypeScript to improve code quality and maintainability.

🔹 Backend API Development

Assist in building and maintaining backend services using Node.js and/or Python
Develop and integrate RESTful APIs to support frontend functionality
Collaborate with senior engineers on backend architecture and implementation decisions

🔹Cloud, Deployment & Tooling

Utilize AWS cloud infrastructure (S3, CloudFront, Amplify) to deploy and manage frontend applications.
Work with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline) to automate deployment and updates.
Ensure seamless integration between development, testing, and production environments

🔹 Collaboration & Agile Development

Work closely with backend developers, designers, and product teams
Participate in code reviews and team meetings to improve development workflows.
Document frontend processes, best practices, and reusable components.

 

What We're Looking For:

Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Proficiency in JavaScript, React.js, and Next.js.
Familiarity with Python and Node.js
Understanding of CSS frameworks (Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Styled Components).
Familiarity with API integration (REST)
Knowledge of state management (Redux, Context API,  Zustand).
Basic understanding of backend concepts (APIs, server-side logic, databases)
Experience with AWS cloud services (S3, CloudFront, Amplify, or Lambda).
Basic understanding of CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline).
Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.

Nice to have: 

Experience with frontend testing (Jest, React Testing Library) and web performance optimization.
Familiarity with basic database concepts (SQL)
Interest in AI-driven products or professional networking platforms

Credit Process:

Students are responsible for consulting their academic department to ensure the internship meets program requirements (e.g., hours completed, deliverables, and learning outcomes). World Salon will collaborate with students to complete necessary forms and provide supporting documentation.

At World Salon, we believe that multilateral discourse is an opportunity to unite visionaries, thinkers, and creators to create impactful change. Our workshops, coaching, and community building activities enable us to establish a wide-ranging network of driven, insightful, and talented individuals. Our leadership programs are designed to unlock your full potential and help you develop the skills you need to become a successful leader. Our community is made up of like-minded individuals who are passionate about making a positive impact in the world. Join us today in driving the urgent change we yearn to see, one conversation at a time.
